20:17 â May 29, 2020
Provincial Concentrator Account Deposits Update
We added procedures to reflect that chargebacks are now processed through CIBC. We updated the Provincial Concentrator Account Deposits (BC) Part in the Payment Solutions Manual as described in the table below.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Provincial Concentrator Account Deposits Part (BC)
Section 3.3, Chargebacks
We clarified that chargebacks for the Province of BC are now processed through CIBCâs transit.
Section 3.4, Misdirected Chargebacks and Dishonoured Items
We clarified that misdirected chargebacks should be returned to CIBC.
Section 4.3, Depositing Provincial Concentrator Account Cheques in Branch Capture
We replaced the image of the Provincial Concentrator Account Endorsement Stamp and clarified that if an item is dishonoured, it should be routed to CIBCâs transit.
